name: thyroid
description: This data set contains 13 clinicopathologic features aiming to predict recurrence of well differentiated thyroid cancer. The data set was collected in duration of 15 years and each patient was followed for at least 10 years.

Smoking.description: Whether the patient is a smoker or not

Hx Smoking.description: Whether the patient has a history of smoking

Hx Radiothreapy.description: Whether the patient has a history of radiotherapy

Thyroid Function.description: Thyroid function status of the patient

T.description: The tumor stage of the cancer

N.description: The lymph node stage of the cancer

M.description: The metastasis stage of the cancer

Stage.description: The overall stage of the cancer

Recurred.description: Whether the cancer recurred or not
